name: Basketball League
description: Basketball League is a fast-paced arcade basketball game with one-on-one and two-on-two matches. Dribble, dash, block and pull off epic slam dunks and three-pointers. Play solo against the CPU or grab a friend for local 2-player action. Climb through Bronze, Silver and Gold Cups, win tournaments, unlock achievements and master powerful supershots. Easy to pick up, hard to put down!
instructions: 1 Player Arrow keys to move X to shoot dunk Z for supershot 2 Players Player 1 uses WASD V B Player 2 uses Arrow keys L K Move to the shot or dunk spot hold to charge release to score
